name: Clear Creek High School
description: Come play pickleball at Clear Creek High School in Pine Valley, CO! There are 5 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Clear Creek Recreation Center
description: Paddles and balls are available for Open Play or clinics, or bring your own.
open_play_schedule: Visit clearcreekrecreation.com for Open Play and clinic schedule.  The court is generally not available except for Open Play or Clinics.
fees: Fee required — Fees are included with membership or pay a daily use fee.
